executables.Name: Current.OrgB.ContentDocumentLink.Insert.LinkedEntityId.Account
executables.pushtopics__ScopeFilter__c: VLOOKUP("Account", "Id", "SourceSystemID__c", LinkedEntityId) != NULL && VLOOKUP("ContentVersion", "ContentDocumentId", "ContentDocumentSourceSystemID__c", ContentDocumentId) != NULL
executables.pushtopics__TargetQueryString__c: SELECT Id, LinkedEntityId, Visibility, ContentDocumentId, ContentDocument.LatestPublishedVersionId FROM ContentDocumentLink WHERE LinkedEntityId IN (SELECT Id FROM Account)

executables.Name: Current.OrgB.ContentVersion.Insert.FirstPublishLocationId.Account
executables.pushtopics__QRetrieveFields__c: Id, ContentDocument.Title, IsLatest, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate, FirstPublishLocationId, Owner.Name
executables.pushtopics__TargetQueryString__c: SELECT Title, ContentSize, FileType, LastModifiedDate, Owner.Name FROM ContentVersion WHERE ContentDocument.ContentAsset.NamespacePrefix = NULL

pushtopics__FieldMappings__r.Name: SharingOption
pushtopics__FieldMappings__r.pushtopics__Label__c: Prevent others from sharing and unsharing
